title: Break Into Tech Social: UC San Diego - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Break Into Tech Social: UC San Diego - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Events

Break Into Tech Social: UC San Diego
April 16
@
5:00 pm
–
6:30 pm
PDT
Meet us for a Break into Tech Social to learn how 1200+ students with no computer science background have started new careers in tech.
Our
Align Master’s program
brings together creative thinkers from every background to learn computer science, data science, and cybersecurity for the very first time.
Join us for appetizers at our next Break into Tech Social to learn more about the Align Master’s program at Northeastern University.
Register now
Please note: Participants must hold a bachelor’s degree or be nearing college graduation to participate.
Questions?
